title: Acadia Pharmaceuticals (ACAD) Q4 2025 Earnings Top Estimates
text: Acadia Pharmaceuticals reported Q4 2025 earnings that topped estimates. Fourth quarter total revenues were $284 million, and for the full year were $1.07 billion on a GAAP basis. In 2025, Acadia recorded total revenues of $1.07 billion, representing 12% year-over-year growth. The company reported Q4 2025 earnings per share of $0.26, beating analyst estimates. NUPLAZID net product sales in Q4 2025 were $196.8 million, up 15% year-over-year. DAYBUE net product sales were $109.6 million, up 13% year-over-year. For 2026, the company provided guidance: Total revenues expected to be $1.22-$1.28 billion. NUPLAZID net sales expected $760-$790 million. DAYBUE sales expected $460-$490 million. Management expects double-digit growth for both core brands in 2026, supported by new product launches, expanded field force, and pipeline catalysts.
